zh.lifeSummary: 當Emmeline FitzWarin of Whittington於1145年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾廷頓時，她的父親Fulk FitzWarin I30歲，母親Eva de Whittington and Alveston37歲。她於1159年與Walter de Hungerford結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1200年在威爾士享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emmeline FitzWarin of Whittington于1145年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾廷頓时，她的父亲Fulk FitzWarin I30岁，母亲Eva de Whittington and Alveston37岁。她于1159年与Walter de Hungerford结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1200年在威尔士享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Emmeline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. In origin it seems to have been a derivative of   Emma  , but when it was revived in the 19th century there was some confusion with   Emily .  It was born by the suffragette  Emmeline Pankhurst  (  1858–1928 ), mother of  Christabel  and  Sylvia .

en.lifeSummary: When Emmeline FitzWarin of Whittington was born in 1145, in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Fulk FitzWarin I, was 30 and her mother, Eva de Whittington and Alveston, was 37. She married Walter de Hungerford in 1159. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1200, in Wales, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emmeline FitzWarin of Whittington est née en 1145, à Whittington, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Fulk FitzWarin I, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Eva de Whittington and Alveston, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Walter de Hungerford en 1159. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1200, à Galles, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emmeline FitzWarin of Whittington 1145 in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Fulk FitzWarin I 30 und ihre Mutter Eva de Whittington and Alveston 37. Sie hat 1159 Walter de Hungerford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1200 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emmeline FitzWarin of Whittington è nata il nel 1145 nel Whittington, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Fulk FitzWarin I, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Eva de Whittington and Alveston, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Walter de Hungerford nel 1159. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1200, nel Galles, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Emmeline FitzWarin of Whittingtonが1145年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィッティントンで生まれた時，父Fulk FitzWarin Iは30歳，母Eva de Whittington and Alvestonは37歳であった。1159年にWalter de Hungerfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1200年にウェールズで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emmeline FitzWarin of Whittington(이)가 1145년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 휘틴그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Fulk FitzWarin I(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eva de Whittington and Alveston(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1159년 Walter de Hungerford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1200년 웨일스에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emmeline FitzWarin of Whittington nasceu em 1145, em Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Fulk FitzWarin I, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Eva de Whittington and Alveston, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter de Hungerford em 1159. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1200, em Gales, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emmeline FitzWarin of Whittington родилась в 1145 г. в местности уиттингтон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Fulk FitzWarin I было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Eva de Whittington and Alveston, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter de Hungerford в 1159 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1200 г. в местности Уэльс в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emmeline FitzWarin of Whittington nació en 1145, en Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Fulk FitzWarin I, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Eva de Whittington and Alveston, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Walter de Hungerford en 1159. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1200, en Gales, a la edad de 55 años.
